featureSections.title: Full-Service Auto Repair & Maintenance
featureSections.body: Whether you need a simple oil change or a complex engine overhaul, our team has the expertise to get the job done right. We service all makes and models, using state-of-the-art diagnostic equipment to pinpoint issues accurately.
bullets: Transparent estimates with no hidden fees
featureSections.cardBody: Every repair comes with a satisfaction guarantee. We stand behind our work because your safety is our priority.

featureSections.title: Brake, Engine & Electrical System Specialists
featureSections.body: From squeaky brakes to check engine lights, our technicians are trained to handle the most common and complex issues. We use premium parts and follow manufacturer specifications to ensure lasting performance.
bullets: A/C service and cooling system repairs
featureSections.cardBody: Properly functioning brakes and electrical systems are critical for your safety. We don't cut corners.

cta.headline: Ready to Get Your Car Serviced?
cta.subheadline: Call us or schedule online today. We'll get you back on the road quickly and safely.

servicesPage.intro: At Master Garage Auto Services LLC, we offer a full range of auto repair and maintenance services to keep your vehicle running smoothly. From routine oil changes to major engine repairs, our certified technicians use the latest tools and techniques to deliver reliable results. Explore our services below and schedule your appointment today.

services.title: Brake Repair & Replacement
services.shortDescription: Expert brake service to ensure your safety on the road.
services.longDescription: Your vehicle's braking system is its most important safety feature. Our technicians perform thorough inspections, replace worn pads and rotors, and ensure your brakes are responsive and reliable. We use high-quality parts and provide honest recommendations.
benefits: Peace of mind on every drive

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We check pads, rotors, calipers, and fluid levels.

process.title: Repair
process.description: Replace worn components with premium parts.

process.title: Test Drive
process.description: We test drive to ensure proper performance.

faqs.question: How often should I replace my brake pads?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000-50,000 miles, but it depends on driving habits. We'll inspect them during your visit.

faqs.question: What are signs of brake problems?
faqs.answer: Squealing, grinding, vibration, or a soft brake pedal. Bring your car in if you notice any of these.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Accurate diagnostics and expert engine repairs.
services.longDescription: When your check engine light comes on, trust us to diagnose the problem correctly. Our advanced diagnostic tools read error codes and identify issues quickly. From minor sensor replacements to major engine overhauls, we handle it all with precision.
benefits: Efficient repairs to save time and money
Improved engine performance and fuel economy

process.title: Scan
process.description: Connect diagnostic equipment to read error codes.

process.title: Diagnose
process.description: Interpret codes and perform additional tests.

process.title: Repair
process.description: Fix the issue with quality parts and expert labor.

faqs.question: What does the check engine light mean?
faqs.answer: It can indicate anything from a loose gas cap to a serious engine problem. We'll diagnose it accurately.

faqs.question: Can you fix check engine light issues same day?
faqs.answer: Many cases are resolved same day. We'll let you know the scope of work first.

services.title: Oil Change & Routine Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Keep your engine running smoothly with regular maintenance.
services.longDescription: Regular oil changes are the lifeblood of your engine. We use high-quality oil and filters to protect your engine and extend its life. Our maintenance packages also include fluid checks, tire rotations, and multi-point inspections to catch issues early.

process.title: Drain & Replace
process.description: Drain old oil and replace with fresh oil and filter.

process.title: Inspect
process.description: Check fluids, belts, hoses, and tire pressure.

process.title: Report
process.description: Provide a detailed report of your vehicle's condition.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Every 3,000-5,000 miles for conventional oil, or up to 7,500 for synthetic. Check your owner's manual.

faqs.question: Do you use synthetic oil?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer conventional and synthetic oil options to suit your vehicle.

services.title: A/C & Heating Service
services.shortDescription: Stay comfortable with reliable climate control service.
services.longDescription: When your car's A/C blows warm air or the heater isn't working, our technicians can diagnose and repair the issue. We service compressors, condensers, evaporators, and recharge refrigerant to restore optimal performance.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: Check refrigerant levels, compressor, and vents.

process.title: Repair
process.description: Fix leaks, replace faulty parts, or recharge refrigerant.

process.title: Test
process.description: Verify system cools and heats properly.

faqs.question: Why is my A/C blowing warm air?
faqs.answer: Common causes include low refrigerant, a faulty compressor, or a leak. We'll diagnose the exact issue.

faqs.question: How often should I service my car's A/C?
faqs.answer: Every 2 years is recommended to maintain efficiency and catch small problems early.

about.headline: Garland's Trusted Auto Repair Team
about.mission: Our mission is to provide honest, high-quality auto repair services that keep our community safe and mobile. We believe in transparency, integrity, and exceptional craftsmanship.
story: Master Garage Auto Services LLC was founded with a simple vision: create an auto repair shop where customers feel respected and informed. Our owner, a seasoned mechanic with over 15 years of experience, saw too many shops prioritizing profit over people. He built Master Garage on the principles of honesty, quality, and fair pricing.

Today, we serve Garland and the surrounding communities with a team of certified technicians who share that commitment. Every car that comes through our doors receives meticulous attention, from routine maintenance to complex repairs. We're proud to be a trusted name in local auto care.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We always tell you what your car needs — and what it doesn't.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-tier parts and follow manufacturer standards for every repair.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We're proud to serve Garland and support our neighbors.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.description: We finish jobs on time and stand behind our work with a satisfaction guarantee.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Ready to schedule service or have questions? We're here to help.
